u with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals space 3 i with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top minus space 2 j with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top comma space v with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals space minus i with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top plus space 4 j with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top space d a n space r with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals space 7 i with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top minus space 8 j with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top. space J i k a space r with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals space m u with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top plus space n v with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top
